name: Zhengzhou Coal Industry & Electric Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhengzhou Coal Industry & Electric Power Co., Ltd. produces and sells coal in China. The company offers lean coal and anthracite for use as industrial power coal. It is also involved in material marketing and supply, power generation, power transmission and transformation, railway transport, and other businesses. The company is based in Zhengzhou, China. Zhengzhou Coal Industry & Electric Power Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Zhengzhou Coal Industry(Group)Co.,Ltd.
